# Data Source (postgresql_database)

Reads information about an existing PostgreSQL database.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "postgresql_database" "main" {
  name = "postgres"
}

output "db_owner" {
  value = data.postgresql_database.main.owner
}

output "db_encoding" {
  value = data.postgresql_database.main.encoding
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the database.

### Read-Only

- `allow_connections` (Boolean) Whether connections are allowed to this database.
- `connection_limit` (Number) Connection limit for the database. -1 means no limit.
- `encoding` (String) Character set encoding of the database.
- `is_template` (Boolean) Whether this database is a template.
- `lc_collate` (String) LC_COLLATE setting of the database.
- `lc_ctype` (String) LC_CTYPE setting of the database.
- `oid` (Number) The OID of the database.
- `owner` (String) The role that owns the database.
- `tablespace_name` (String) The default tablespace for the database.
